title: Add Image-to-Image operation to all image models that lack it (SDXL x5 + Chroma)
description:
KREA2 shipped i2i as a new op on the SAME t2i graph, flipped by an injected Input_Is_i2i boolean (commandRegistry.js i2i op, line ~95: injectParams {Input_Is_i2i:true}, components include denoise, defaults denoise 0.30). Extend that op to every other IMAGE model missing it. TARGETS (6): sdxl-realistic, sdxl-nsfw, ill-anime-beauty, ill-anime, pony-mix (type sdxl), chroma-flash (type chroma). EXCLUDED: krea2-turbo + krea2-turbo-nsfw (already have i2i); nvidia-pid (upscaler-only, no t2i graph); all video models. 

TWO-SIDED WORK: 
(A) models.js wiring [agent] — for each target add 'i2i' to supportedOps (right after 't2i') and i2i:'<its own t2i json>' to the workflows map (i2i shares the t2i graph, same as krea2). No commandRegistry change: the i2i op is already defined and its components are capability-gated per model (SDXL/Chroma have no styleLoras/qualityTier, so they auto-show only denoise/ratio/batch/enhance). 
(B) workflow graphs [USER] — each t2i runtime json (t2i_sdxl_*.json, Chroma_t2i.json) needs the Input_Is_i2i gate added: an Input_Image load + latent-source MpiIfElse switch + an Input_denoise MpiFloat reaching the sampler only through that gate (mirror the KREA2 t2i graph). Verified 2026-07-10: NONE of the 6 t2i graphs currently carry Input_Is_i2i (grep = 0). Until the user lands (B), the models.js wiring is INERT-then-BROKEN: picking i2i would silently run t2i and ignore the input image (commandRegistry warns this exactly). 

SEQUENCING: (A) is declarative + safe to land first; (B) lands per the user's live workflow edits. SDXL graphs are template-driven (generate_sdxl.py) so the gate likely goes in sdxl_t2i_template.json then regen; Chroma_t2i.json is hand-edited (no script). Do NOT regen ahead of the user's template edits.

PROGRESS (2026-07-10): (A) models.js DONE for all 6 (validated: 8 models now expose i2i, every i2i workflow == its t2i graph). CHROMA DONE end-to-end: user saved Chroma_t2i_template.json (the i2i graph needs SCRIPTING because of the optional-image placeholder injection); wrote generate_chroma.py (single variant, no style rack/bypass — just two stamps: Input_Image->placeholder.png so plain t2i validates, and Input_Is_i2i->false because the template exported mid-i2i-test bakes true, which would make every t2i run as i2i); added ('Chroma_','chroma') to registry.py HANDLERS; ran it -> Chroma_t2i.json (33 nodes, Input_denoise MpiFloat 0.3 present so denoise injection won't silent-drop). 

STILL OPEN — SDXL x5 (one template sdxl_t2i_template.json -> 5 runtimes via generate_sdxl.py): waiting on USER to add the i2i nodes (Input_Image / Input_Is_i2i / Input_denoise) to sdxl_t2i_template.json. generate_sdxl.py currently ONLY bakes the checkpoint — when the template lands it needs the SAME two stamps Chroma got (placeholder + Is_i2i=false, guarded no-op if absent). User chose WAIT-for-template (stamp against real node titles). Then regen + verify the 5 runtimes.
